name: Find nearest tectonic plate boundary to an earthquake epicenter
prompt: Read earthquake.json with an earthquake's coordinates and boundaries.csv with tectonic plate boundary points. Using the Haversine formula (Earth radius = 6371 km), find the nearest plate boundary point to the earthquake. Also compute the bearing from the earthquake to the nearest boundary point. Write result.json with: nearest_point (object with id, name, latitude, longitude), distance_km (number), bearing_degrees (0-360, 0=North).

criteria.description: result.json exists and is valid JSON
Nearest boundary point ID is 3 (Japan Trench South)
Distance is within 5 km of 226.00 km
Bearing is in valid range 0-360 degrees
